Document:
# Armor
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Armor"]
Protection in the Wasteland ranges from scrapped leather to pre-war powered exoskeletons. What you wear determines whether you walk away from a firefight.
## Power Armor
The pinnacle of pre-war personal protection. Requires training to operate effectively.
[bold][color=#a4885c]Model[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Description[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Primary Users[/color][/bold]
[bold]T-45[/bold]
First-generation. Heavy, reliable.
BoS, NCR (salvaged)
[bold]T-51[/bold]
Iconic pre-war infantry armor. Superior protection and ergonomics vs T-45.
Brotherhood of Steel
[bold]T-60[/bold]
Advanced model. Improved plating and servos. Rare.
Brotherhood of Steel
[bold]T-60 Tesla[/bold]
T-60 with integrated Tesla coils for energy weapon amplification.
BoS (specialized)
[bold]Advanced PA Mk1[/bold]
Enclave-manufactured. Superior to Brotherhood equipment.
The Enclave
[bold]Advanced PA Mk2[/bold]
Top-of-the-line Enclave. Most advanced personal armor known.
The Enclave
[bold]Mk2 Hellfire[/bold]
Incendiary-hardened Mk2 for extreme combat environments.
The Enclave (elite)
[bold]Raider Power Armor[/bold]
Scavenged, jury-rigged. PA protection at PA weight without PA reliability.
Raiders, Outlaws
## Faction Armor
[bold][color=#4a6a99]Brotherhood of Steel[/color][/bold] Knight Armor, Squire Armor, Head Knight Armor, Scribe Robes
[bold][color=#a4885c]NCR[/color][/bold] Enhanced Vest, Pouched Combat Armor, Heavy Combat Armor, Elite Combat Armor, Command Armor, Field Medic Vest, Salvaged Metal Armor, Regional Camouflage variants
[bold][color=#cc3333]Caesar's Legion[/color][/bold] Warrior Armor, Prime Decanus Armor, Veteran Decanus Armor
[bold][color=#888888]Outlaws[/color][/bold] Fiend Armor, Jackal Armor, Viper Armor, Khan's Jacket, Khan's Armored Jacket, Khan Combat Armor
[bold][color=#336699]Enclave[/color][/bold] Rank Pins (15 military ranks), Peacekeeper armor variants
## General Armor
[bold]Leather Armor[/bold] — Light, common, minimal protection.
[bold]Metal Armor[/bold] — Solid protection, heavy, scrap-built variants.
[bold]Reinforced Armor[/bold] — Upgraded leather/metal with extra plating.
[bold]Tribal Armor[/bold] — Handcrafted, light, culturally significant.
[bold]Chitin / Insect Armor[/bold] — Harvested from creatures, surprisingly effective.
[bold]Rad Armor[/bold] — Specialized radiation protection.
## Creature-Sourced Armor
[bold][color=#a4885c]Item[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Source[/color][/bold]
Deathclaw Cloak
Deathclaw hide
Razorclaw Armor
Razorclaw hide
Raven Cloak
Wasteland raven feathers
Deathclaw Hood
Deathclaw skull
Razorclaw Helm
Razorclaw skull
